# Code of Conduct

## Our Commitment

We are committed to making participation in this project a respectful, harassment-free experience for everyone.

## Expected Behavior

- Be respectful and constructive.
- Assume good intent.
- Provide helpful feedback focused on ideas and implementation.

## Unacceptable Behavior

- Harassment, discrimination, or personal attacks.
- Trolling, insulting, or derogatory comments.
- Publishing private information without consent.

## Enforcement

Project maintainers may remove or edit comments, issues, or pull requests that violate this Code of Conduct and may take moderation actions as needed.

## Reporting

If you experience or witness unacceptable behavior, open a private report to maintainers via GitHub.
